description_long: This is a plush, two-seater red recliner with thick, overstuffed cushions on the seat, backrest, and armrests, providing a sense of comfort and luxury. The upholstery appears to be a soft, velvety fabric, giving the recliner a matte finish and a cozy appearance. The armrests are wide and heavily padded, seamlessly integrated into the overall form of the chair. The backrest is divided into two distinct, generously cushioned sections, offering ample support for both the upper and lower back. The base of the recliner is solid and boxy, with short, sturdy feet barely visible beneath the fabric. There are no visible levers, buttons, or mechanical parts, and the design is clean and modern, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A plush, red, two-seater recliner with thick, velvety upholstery and wide, padded armrests. The backrest is segmented and the overall design is modern and inviting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the seat and the thick, padded armrest and backrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two-seat configuration, segmented backrest, and wide, plush armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the depth and plushness of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the continuous, padded back and the solid, boxy base.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are wide, thickly padded, and fully upholstered in the same red fabric as the rest of the recliner, with a soft, rounded shape and no visible seams or hardware.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is divided into two large, cushioned sections, providing distinct support for each seat and enhancing comfort.
